meta.name: three.ws
meta.description: three.ws is the AI-agent layer for the open web: build, embed, monetize, and trade autonomous agents with real 3D avatars, on-chain identity (ERC-8004), pay-per-call (x402), and pump.fun token launches.
meta.updated_marker: Edit only the manifest. sitemap.html, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, /changelog regenerate from this file.

categories.title: Labs
categories.description: Experimental features actively shipping. Expect fast iteration.

categories.title: Crypto
categories.description: On-chain features: pay-per-call, token launches, vanity wallets.

categories.title: Agent Tools
categories.description: Manage, talk to, and deploy individual agents.

features.title: Home
features.summary: Landing page. Pitch, live agent demos, and the front door to every flow.

features.title: Discover
features.summary: On-chain agent directory (ERC-8004 + Solana). Browse, search, and inspect every registered agent.

features.title: Avatar Gallery
features.summary: Every public 3D avatar in the system, browsable as a grid.

features.title: Walk
features.summary: Drive a 3D avatar around with a joystick or WASD — toggle the back camera for AR-style passthrough.

features.title: Marketplace
features.summary: Buy access to agents, skills, and avatars from other creators.

features.title: Community
features.summary: Featured creators, builds, and conversations from the three.ws community.

features.title: Sitemap
features.summary: Human-readable index of every page on three.ws.

features.title: Create Agent
features.summary: Wizard for building a new agent: avatar, brain (LLM + prompt), skills, and on-chain identity.

features.title: Viewer
features.summary: Drag-and-drop glTF/GLB viewer for inspecting 3D models in the browser.

features.title: glTF Validator
features.summary: Khronos-spec validator for glTF/GLB files. Paste a URL or upload a model.

features.title: Widget Studio
features.summary: Pick an avatar, configure embed options, copy a one-line snippet for your site.

features.title: Artifact Viewer
features.summary: Renders Claude artifact bundles as standalone embeddable apps.

features.title: Widgets Gallery
features.summary: Pre-built chat, voice, and 3D-avatar widgets you can drop into any page.

features.title: Hydrate
features.summary: Take an existing on-chain agent (ERC-8004 / Solana) and attach a 3D body, voice, and skills.

features.title: Features
features.summary: Full feature overview of the three.ws platform: avatars, agents, on-chain identity, x402 payments, and embedding.

features.title: Launchpad Studio
features.summary: Build a hosted 3D launchpad, token page, concierge, or showroom on a three.ws subdomain.

features.title: 3D Walkaround
features.summary: WASD + mobile joystick navigation with Rapier physics and Recast navmesh. Click the ground to autopilot.

features.title: Multi-LLM Brain
features.summary: Send one prompt to Claude, GPT, Qwen, ModelScope, and Groq simultaneously. Side-by-side streaming with latency and token stats.

features.title: Lipsync (TTS)
features.summary: Type text, stream it through OpenAI TTS, and the avatar's mouth animates in real time via wawa-lipsync viseme detection.

features.title: Lipsync (Mic)
features.summary: Feed live mic audio through the viseme analyser and watch the avatar's mouth track your voice in real time.

features.title: Avatar Artifact
features.summary: Standalone Three.js viewer for avatar artifacts — embeddable and shareable without any wrapper page.

features.title: Pay (x402)
features.summary: Pay-per-call gateway: invoke any x402-protocol paid API with a USDC micro-transaction.

features.title: Pump.fun Stream
features.summary: Mint and trade pump.fun agent tokens on Solana. Live feed of every launch.

features.title: Pump Live
features.summary: Real-time SSE feed of every pump.fun launch as it happens.

features.title: Pump Dashboard
features.summary: Pump.fun trading desk: watchlists, scanner, quotes, portfolio, and live charts.

features.title: Strategy Lab
features.summary: Build DCA and subscription strategies that trade on-chain on your behalf.

features.title: Solana Vanity Wallet
features.summary: Grind a Solana address with a custom prefix using your browser's GPU.

features.title: ETH Vanity (CREATE2)
features.summary: Grind a vanity smart-contract address using the ThreeWSFactory CREATE2 deployer on BSC.

features.title: Pump Visualizer
features.summary: 3D visualizer of trending pump.fun tokens — live market data rendered as an interactive scene.

features.title: Chat
features.summary: Talk to your agent. Voice, text, and tool-use in one interface.

features.title: Agent Home
features.summary: Default landing for an agent instance — chat, embed, and remix actions.

features.title: Agents Index
features.summary: Browse every registered agent on three.ws.

features.title: Reputation Explorer
features.summary: Inspect on-chain reputation scores and attestations for any agent.

features.title: Sign in
features.summary: Sign in with email, GitHub, or a connected wallet.

features.title: Create account
features.summary: Create a new three.ws account.

features.title: Forgot password
features.summary: Request a password-reset email.

features.title: Dashboard
features.summary: Authenticated dashboard — manage agents, avatars, widgets, knowledge, transcripts, and earnings.

features.title: Docs
features.summary: Full documentation: SDKs, API reference, embedding, agent system, smart contracts.

features.title: Docs · Quick Start
features.summary: Five-minute walkthrough: create an agent, embed it, get a paid call.

features.summary: How agents, avatars, skills, and memories fit together.

features.summary: Embed an agent via iframe, oEmbed, or the <agent-3d> web component.

features.summary: Reference for the <agent-3d> custom element.

features.title: Docs · MCP
features.summary: Expose your agent as an MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, and other clients.

features.title: Docs · Skills
features.summary: Write, package, and monetize agent skills.

features.title: Docs · Widgets
features.summary: Build and publish reusable chat and 3D widgets.

features.summary: Full HTTP API reference.

features.summary: JavaScript / Node SDK for three.ws.

features.summary: Cloud marketplaces and ecosystem directories where three.ws is listed.

features.title: Tutorials
features.summary: Step-by-step build guides.

features.title: Blog
features.summary: Editorial index of three.ws launches and long-form posts.

features.summary: How three.ws handles user data.
